summary: Priya says, decision confirmed, pro pilot live payment testing is useful, but not required before the first controlled launch. The meeting aligned on the main priorities and next steps

summary_slots.purpose: Priya says, decision confirmed, pro pilot live payment testing is useful, but not required before the first controlled launch
summary_slots.outcome: The meeting aligned on the main priorities and next steps
risks: Pricing confirmation may delay the client follow-up
next_steps: Run a production smoke test for signup, checkout, upload, note generation, download, and usage tracking by noon tomorrow.
Prepare the main list submission using the Acjen AI URL by the end of the week.
Draft the first support macro for failed uploads and long processing by Wednesday.
Confirm whether the public pricing table should show starter at $23 and pro pilot at $49.
Verify Square and PayPal webhook logs after the next test payment.

key_points: Priya says, decision confirmed, pro pilot live payment testing is useful, but not required before the first controlled launch
Priya says, decision confirmed, single site on-chain outside the first pilot scope unless a client specifically requests it
Priya says, decision confirmed, Acjen AI as the primary public URL, and avoid submitting the raw version URL to launch sites
Ethan says, Ethan will confirm whether the public pricing table should show starter at $23 and pro pilot at $49
Priya says, the goal today is to review pilot implementation and billing readiness planning and finish with a marked decision, risks, questions, and owners
Priya says, decision confirmed, launch has controlled early access, not a full public enterprise launch
decisions: confirmed, launch has controlled early access, not a full public enterprise launch
confirmed, starter checkout is the primary public plan for now
